rulings.Case Title: KEVIN DORGAN VS. EDWARD CHUTE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 5, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT EDMUND CHUTE Notice Of Motion For Judgment is continued to November 6, 2020 to be heard with other pending motion.=(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JULIANA CLEGG VS. WILMINGTON TRUST, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disregard And Set Aside And Referees Tentative Report And Recommendations Re Plaintiffs Motion For Sanctions And Objections Thereto
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 5, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT FAY SERVICING, LLC, WILMINGTON TRUST, Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disregard And Set Aside And Referees Tentative Report And Recommendations Re Plaintiffs Motion For Sanctions And Objections Thereto is continued to November 9, 2020. Moving party is ordered to provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers and Referee's Report and Recommendation with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date no later than November 5, 2020 by 9:00 a.m. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SUMMER PIERCE ET AL VS. THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Defendants? Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs? First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 5, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, DAN STONE Notice Of Motion To Strike; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Defendants? Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs? First Amended Complaint is DENIED. Claims for damages are sufficiently stated. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SUMMER PIERCE ET AL VS. THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 5, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, DAN STONE DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states facts to state all causes of action. Factual issues and the veracity of allegations will not be addressed on a demurrer. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON, VS. THERESA LYNNE MURPHY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike The Whole Of Answer, Or Portions Of Answer By Specialized Loan Servicing Llc; Or, In The Alternative, To Dismiss Frivolous Complaint For Judicial Foreclosure By Specialized Loan Servicing Llc; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Filed By Cross-Complainant Murphy
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 5, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT THERESA PHINNESSEE Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike The Whole Of Answer, Or Portions Of Answer By Specialized Loan Servicing Llc; Or, In The Alternative, To Dismiss Frivolous Complaint For Judicial Foreclosure By Specialized Loan Servicing Llc; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Filed By Cross-Complainant Murphy is moot in part and denied in part. Motion to Strike Answer to Cross-Complaint is moot. Cross-Complaint has been stricken by the order of the presiding judge on November 3, 2020. Furthermore, the answer to the Cross-Complaint at issue in this motion has not been properly filed with the Court (rejection notice dated July 6, 2020). Motion to Dismiss Complaint is DENIED. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON, VS. THERESA LYNNE MURPHY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 5, 2020 line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT WILLIAM COLEMAN DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT is continued to December 11, 2020. Moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the operative cross-complaint and reply no later than November 25, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS C. O'KANE ET AL VS. WALGREEN'S INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Oder To Show Cause For Issuance Of Preliminary And Permanent Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 5, 2020 line 6. Courtesy copies to be delivered to department 50 1 no later than November 5, 2020 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: FRANCINE VERDIER VS. TONY SINGH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 5, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT JIMMY NGO DEMURRER to 2ND Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. The Court notes that demurrer to the original complaint was not opposed, opposition to the demurrer to the first amended complaint was filed after a CCP 473(b) motion. =(501/CFH)
